gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer approved the Apache-2.0 metadata, README, LICENSE, and release-bundle wheel validation with no blocking findings.
verification: rm -rf dist && poetry build -q; wheel metadata includes License-Expression: Apache-2.0, License-File: LICENSE, Apache classifier, and .dist-info/licenses/LICENSE
poetry run pytest -q tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_release_bundle.py -> 77 passed
what_changed: Added Apache-2.0 license metadata and root LICENSE for the open-source package.
Documented the License section in README and pinned governance tests for pyproject license metadata.
Extended release-bundle wheel validation to require Apache-2.0 license metadata and bundled wheel license file.
why: The project goal requires an open-source Python package; release artifacts should carry explicit license metadata and fail closed if tested wheels omit it.
